JUDGE GEORGE T CHOPPELAS 10:23AM CASE SENT FOR DEPT 1 FOR A PRVOE-UP HRG, DEFT. OSCAR MINOR APPEARED IN COURT WHILE SMALL CLAIMS COURT WAS IN SESSION. A SETTLEMENT WAS REACHED BY BOTH SIDES. JUDGMENT FOR THE PLT. FOR POSSESSION OF PRESMISES LOCATED AT 450 HAIGHT ST. #1; LEASE AGREEMENT IF FOR RENT AND DAMAGES OF $4372.23 AND ATTNVS FEES OF $775. WRIT MAY ISSUE STAYED ON THE CONDITION DEFTS PAY $5147.23 TO THE PLT.'S ATTNY BY 5/3/93. DEFT. ALSO AGREES TO PAY MONTHLY RENT ON TIME WITH A 5 DAY GRACE PERIOD. IF DEFTS FAIL TO COMPLY, PLT. BY EXPARTE WILL APPLY TO COURT FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT. IF DEFTS COMPLY, PLT. WILL FILE A SATISFCTION OF JUDGMENT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MINOR, OSCAR MINOR, GRACE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 450 HAIGHT ST #1 $4,372.23 RENT, $775.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,147.23, LEASE FORFEITED
